channel.title: Games and Hobbies (new posts)
channel.description: Posts in the forum category "Games and Hobbies" - General talk about things you play, or things you do, does not have to be SCP related. Includes SCP mods and Conventions you may go to!

item.title: Favorite video game quotes?: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"The darkest pit of hell has opened to swallow you whole; don't keep the Devil waiting, friend."
-FNaF of all places

The world calls for the skills of us horrid men. And we answer. No greater good. No just cause. Just a paycheck, and another dead man.
-MGS V

Joshua Graham: "For many of us, the road is a difficult one, but the path is always there for us to follow, no matter how many times we may fall."
Courier: "Do you ever 'fall?'"
"Every day. Some days are… harder than others."
-Fallout: New Vegas

item.title: SCP D and D campaign: Re: SCP DnD campaign
item.content:encoded:
Honestly I can only think of one problem. If you are setting a DnD campaign about SCP's you gotta think it through. So here are some questions I would ask myself if I would make this sort of thing.

What map will you play on?

Honestly I would play on site-11 since it is a complex "housing district" but site-19 works well.

What SCP's do you think you need to add? And who should they be fighting?

First of all as Kothardarastrix stated, it would be better if who you'd play as were G.O.C agents and operatives since they want to kill SCP's. And second you need SCP's that are killable so no SCP-682 or SCP-096 and many more that are un-reachable and are unkillable. Unless you wish to use Thaumiel or helpful SCP's in your party that can kill them. But I doubt any friendly and helpful SCP's will be able to kill these monsters

What will be the campaign's goal?

Well if you plan on using G.O.C obviously to kill every SCP that you can kill.
If you plan on using Chaos Insurgency well use SCP's to make the foundation's life living hell. Read about other GOI's since there are a lot of them and you got a pretty good story.

Can i use other GOI's? like chaos insurgency or the the church of the second hytoth?

As I stated before, Sure. If you know about them and plan on how to use them correctly in your DnD campaign go ahead. Read, learn and observe that way you can make the best campaign you or anyone has ever seen.

Anyways you can make it whatever you wish and it does not have to make sense that much just do what your heart tells you and well continue to do it

item.title: SCP: Meme Breach: Re: SCP: Meme Breach
item.content:encoded: This is amazing. For one dev all this work just to make a meme version of a classic game? mwa senior MWA. Keep up the hard work and if you ask me for any problems with it? None it is perfecto, at least for me.

item.title: I need a tactical fps MTF game: Re: I need a tactical fps MTF game
item.content:encoded: I don't know of any MTF Games but you can search for MTF mods that were made in Containment breach. Or an official MTF game set in containment breach I saw a while ago.

item.title: Favorite Hobbies before covid-19?: Favorite Hobbies before covid-19?
item.content:encoded: Before this stinky virus what did you like to do in public spaces and in your home? except for sitting and writing SCP's all-day what did you like to do?

item.title: Favorite video game quotes?: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: the lore 🌚

item.title: Games a clockwork man plays: Re: Games a clockwork man plays
item.content:encoded:
Had anyone noticed now that the whole foundation is made into a game…
(sorry if anyone hates this)

item.title: SCP: Meme Breach: Re: SCP: Meme Breach
item.content:encoded: Nice to hear from a man of true gender equality.

item.title: Apparently, there is a deleted/removed ending in SCP: Containment Breach.: Re: Apparently, there is a deleted/removed ending in SCP: Containment Breach.
item.content:encoded: I wonder why it was deleted… Was it unnecessary, not satisfying, etc.? Well, whatever it was, it's the dev's decision and they obviously know what's best for their game lol

item.title: Apparently, there is a deleted/removed ending in SCP: Containment Breach.: Apparently, there is a deleted/removed ending in SCP: Containment Breach.
item.content:encoded:
I found this ending from this video.
So, in this video, the person shows a deleted, secret if you could say, ending from the SCP: Containment Breach game. I'll explain this ending.

So, after you enter EZ and start searching for Gate-B and avoiding MTFs, after you finally enter the elevator. This happens:
SCP-173 enters and then snaps your neck and the game ends.

This is the dialogue that you can hear after that happens.

"Sir, there's a Class-D outside the elevator in Gate-B. Should we send someone in to get him?

"He might have some useful information about what's going on in there. I'll call-

"Never mind sir. It looks like 173 already took care of him.

Dialog end.

Unfortunately, since the ending is deleted, you can only get this through commands. If you want to test this out, here is the command. The command is:
ending b1

Hope it works for you! :)

item.title: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?: Admin Post - Info - Closed
item.content:encoded: Moved to Games and Hobbies.

item.title: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?: Mod Post- Closed
item.content:encoded:
Not the site for discussion of the game's specifics. Look into the resources linked above.

Thread locked.

item.title: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?: Re: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?
item.content:encoded:
Heya! I think you'll find that there aren't a lot of active forum-users here who have played Containment Breach, or many of the fangames. This forums and the site at large is more aimed towards the SCP universe and the stories it contains, and the games don't usually come up outside of the Game and Hobbies forum.

The game has a dedicated forum here and a discord server here where questions like this can be better answered. To my knowledge however, I don't think such an ending is possible.

item.title: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?: Can we make Scp-106 follow us to Gate B and combine 682 breach ending with him?
item.content:encoded: I wonder if it is possible and is there a secret ending about it, or something like that.

item.title: Video Games: Re: Video Games
item.content:encoded:
Well I'll break it down into: Nintendo 64, PC, PS1, PS2, Nintendo Switch, Arcade, Mobile
Nintendo 64: Goldeneye 007, Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, Resident Evil 2, Vigilante 8, Shadow Man, Army Men: Sarge's Heroes
PC: Garry's Mod, SCP: Secret Laboratory, Battlefield 1942, Battlefield Vietnam, SWAT 4, Left 4 Dead 2, Mount and Blade: Warband
PS1: Silent Hill, ReBoot, Metal Gear Solid
PS2: Silent Hill 2 and 3, GTA: San Andreas, Star Wars Battlefront 2
Nintendo Switch: Stardew Valley, Sniper Elite III, Attack on Titan 2
Arcade: Time Crisis series, Area 51, Berserk
Mobile: Bleach Brave Souls, any game made by MDickie (yes, I actually like his games!)

I actually have many many more but I think listing all my favorites will take up too much on this post!

item.title: Video Games: Re: Video Games
item.content:encoded: *inhales* (not in order of importance) The Zelda Series, Minecraft, Hollow Knight, Katana Zero, Slime Rancher, Undertale/Deltarune, Spooky's Jumpscare Mansion, Doki Doki Literature Club, Mario Games, Celeste, Castle Crashers, Fable (the first one, the others are trash), Darksiders series, Bioshock series, and a bunch of others I can't think of at the moment.

item.title: GL Labs: Re: GL Labs
item.content:encoded: If anyone's wondering about that legal dispute, a mobile developer "Spooky House" threatened legal action against them because of the name. They DID change it, but by comically taping it over the old title.

item.title: GL Labs: GL Labs
item.content:encoded:
GL Labs from the horror game "Spooky's Jumpscare Mansion" (formerly "Spooky's House of Jumpscares" due to a legal dispute) is a pretty clear reference to the SCP foundation. From the capturing of anomalous entities (referred to as "Specimens") and testing on human subjects to the general disregard for the safety of its employees, it seems pretty obvious.

Has anyone else here played this game? If not, it's definitely worth it!

item.title: SCP Hardcore RP Project | Minecraft Server: Re: SCP Hardcore RP Project | Minecraft Server
item.content:encoded:
[Update] Just added the project to PMC. Also the Release has been moved to the 26th at the will of the people.

https://www.planetminecraft.com/server/havenrp-western-rp-rpg-scp-rp-creative-plots/

item.title: Blankets: Re: Blankets
item.content:encoded:
+ show block
– hide block

No uncollapsed images in the forums, please.

Why yes I just spent 15 minutes making this edit just for a dumb joke, what else was I supposed to do? Not make a dumb joke? Don't be silly
